guidance: Targets ~60:40 BESS-to-solar EPC revenue mix, tilting toward storage.
Backward integration into modules/BESS to lift margins and secure supply.
First full year as listed co (IPO Sep-2025); scaling on NTPC/SJVN-type utility orders.
insights: Key wins include BESS orders for NTPC and solar EPC for SJVN Green Energy.
Order book ~Rs2,813cr; strong Q4 execution drove full-year ramp.
FY26 consol net profit Rs120.5cr up 56%; total income Rs1,416cr up 157%; Q4 PAT Rs49.1cr up 420%.
Building manufacturing: ~1.55GW module line and ~3.4GW BESS facility.
concall.orderExecution: Rs2,813cr order book, weighted to BESS and utility solar, executes over roughly the next 18-24 months.
concall.source: Q4/FY26 earnings call (audio 26-May-2026); financepulse.ai, worldsolar.in transcript, screener.in, ICICIdirect

notes: Registry-level identity only; a detail JSON has not been added yet (model + manual approach).
